heading: Share of fines and forfeitures to benefit Armed Forces Retirement Home
label: 2772 Share of fines and forfeitures to benefit Armed Forces Retirement Home
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2772, , , authorized withholding of pay of officers of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or Marine Corps, and is covered by , Pay and Allowances of the Uniformed Services, prior to repeal by , , , effective .act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 104170A Stat. 156section 1007 of Title 37Pub. L. 87–649, § 14c(3)76 Stat. 501Sept. 7, 1962Nov. 1, 1962

Amendments2011—Subsec. (b). substituted “Chief Operating Officer of the Armed Forces Retirement Home” for “Armed Forces Retirement Home Board”.Pub. L. 112–812010—Subsec. (a). , inserted “or, in the case of the Coast Guard, the Commandant” after “concerned” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 111–281, § 205(b)(1)(A)Subsec. (c). , struck out subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “In this section, the term ‘armed forces’ does not include the Coast Guard when it is not operating as a service in the Navy.”Pub. L. 111–281, § 205(b)(1)(B)1990—, substituted “Retirement Home” for “retirement homes” in section catchline and amended text generally, substituting subsecs. (a) to (c) relating to shares of fines and forfeitures to benefit the Armed Forces Retirement Home for former subsecs. (a) and (b) relating to shares of fines and forfeitures to benefit the Soldiers’ Home and the Naval Home.Pub. L. 101–510, § 1533(a)(4)(A), inserted “and forfeitures” after “fines” in subsecs. (a)(1)(A) and (b)(1)(A) and substituted “, warrant officer, or limited duty officer” for “or warrant officer” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 101–510, § 1533(a)(3)

children.text: The amount of forfeitures and fines adjudged against an enlisted member, warrant officer, or limited duty officer of the armed forces by sentence of a court martial or under authority of (article 15) over and above any amount that may be due from the member, warrant officer, or limited duty officer for the reimbursement of the United States or any individual.section 815 of this title
The amount of forfeitures on account of the desertion of an enlisted member, warrant officer, or limited duty officer of the armed forces.

children.heading: .—Determination of Percentage
children.label: b .—Determination of Percentage
children.text: The Chief Operating Officer of the Armed Forces Retirement Home shall determine, on the basis of the financial needs of the Armed Forces Retirement Home, the percentage of the amounts referred to in subsection (a) to be deposited in the trust fund referred to in such subsection.
